§6Hazmat Suits§f

§aBasic radiation protection for early nuclear work.§f

§bHazmat Suit§f: Hazmat Cloth (lead + latex) + Glass + Iron Plate. RR 0.59 total.
§bAdvanced Hazmat§f: Grey variant. Better cloth = better RR.

Made in the Assembly Machine with the hazmat blueprint.

§cWarning§f: Hazmat does NOT block direct contact with spent fuel, debris, or waste. Always carry Radaway.

§eTip§f: Check JEI for the exact Assembly Machine recipe for each piece.
